title: An Act amending the membership of the Quabbin watershed advisory committee

abstracts.abstract: Senate, June 25, 2026 -- The committee on Senate Bills in the Third Reading to whom was referred the Senate Bill relative to the Quabbin Watershed Advisory Committee (Senate, No. 652); reports, recommending that the same be amended as follows, and that, when so amended, it will be correctly drawn:-- by substituting a new draft entitled "An Act amending the membership of the Quabbin watershed advisory committee" (Senate, No. 3133)

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Bills in the Third Reading
Substituted as a new draft for S652
Read; and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

related_entities.name: the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
